title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.849 - Effective date of repeal of act
text:
454.849.  Effective date of repeal of act. — The repeal of sections 454.850 to 454.999 shall become effective June 15, 2016.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260 § B, A.L. 2016 H.B. 1550 merged with S.B. 905 & 992) 
Effective 6-15-16 (S.B. 905 & 992); 8-28-16 (H.B. 1550)
